title: Bernokl's GitHub Pages
description: THis is a page Mr Matt and Berno is nerding out on WEDNESDAY1

sections.title: This is our first box ..of pizza!
sections.content: This is a simple website that updates automatically when you change the JSON content.
sections.tooltip: This is the exited/happy man image!

sections.title: This is our second box
sections.content: Edit the content/pages.json file to update this website. When you commit and push, GitHub Actions will automatically rebuild and deploy the site.
sections.tooltip: This is the thinking person image!
sections.contentTooltip: This tooltip appears when you hover over the text content!

sections.title: Confused Man
sections.content: This section features a screenshot image. The image is stored in the images/ folder and referenced with a relative path.
sections.tooltip: This is your screenshot! Images in the images/ folder are automatically available on GitHub Pages.
